creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158377
security/vuxml entry for ansible

Document the ansible CVE fixed in bug 201200.  Also Ansible security issues documented at http://www.ansible.com/security were never documented and they all impacted FreeBSD at some point in the history of the port.  As such document them all now.

Note this seperate PR for vuxml will make the bug 201200 comment 6 patch obsolete.  That was tagged on after the the PR.
